name: homelab
description: Self-hosted infra on a 3-node K3s cluster managed with Flux GitOps. Media, home automation, photos, and auth.

name: groundwork
description: Self-service AWS account factory. Teams provision accounts on-demand with federated OIDC — no long-lived credentials.

name: cortex
description: Zero-knowledge encrypted cloud backup. Server never sees your data — ChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption, client-side only.

name: ffsync
description: Serverless self-hosted Firefox Sync on AWS. Own your bookmarks, history, and passwords.

name: connections
description: CLI tool that turns JSON flight data into interactive airport route maps. Deploys to AWS CloudFront.
